programmes.show_description: Mexico's Haunted Cenotes. Phil and Jess investigate caverns believed to be portals to the Maya underworld. The sacred cenotes supposedly hide secrets far darker than any legend. S3, Ep9
Ring Of Fire UFOs. Phil and Jess probe the science behind geology's strangest phenomena while investigating mysterious objects flying around Mexico's tallest active volcano. S3, Ep10

Shock & Awe. The Baggage Battlers heads to the Louisiana Farm auction to bid on Americana collected for over 50 years. Mark misfires when he bids on the wrong item. S2, Ep14
Bad Blood. The Baggage Battlers are back. Today they visit an auction in Red Hook, N.Y., to try to take home a piece of history. Will they succeed? S3, Ep1
All in. Derek prepares to execute his plan of raiding Shawn's gold-rich spots. Plus, Vernon is stressed as the season closes in and his $200,000 investment could be lost. S5, Ep15
Jackpot. Derek experiences the wrath of Mr. Gold when he's caught mining on the Christine Rose's lucky spot. Plus, Emily has a panic attack on the Eroica. S5, Ep16
The Victoria Diggers' million-dollar dream is nearly at breaking point. Plus, the Dirt Dogs hunt down gold thieves and the Mahoneys stumble across a mysterious murder. S4, Ep5
The Ozark Howler. In Missouri, Forrest and Jessica examine reports of a wolf-like creature. A chance encounter with a local moonshiner leads them to an amazing discovery. S1, Ep4
Endless. Edgar Hansen is fed up with the 22 year marathon of pain, and finally confronts older brother Sig. Meanwhile, the Opilio Season ends with a harrowing mayday. S6, Ep16

programmes.show_name: Deadliest Catch: Inside the Catch: Best Brawls
programmes.show_description: Takes a closer look at the feuds and short fuses that make up the best Deadliest Catch conflicts. On a crab boat, sometimes the only way to earn respect is to fight for it.
Jaguars Gold. The treasure hunters make a new discovery, and a run-in with a jaguar leads to another revelation, but the new path has tragic consequences for Captain Keith. S2, Ep5
The Sultan's Heart. Josh Gates travels to Turkey and Hungary to find the missing heart of one of the greatest Ottoman rulers in Turkish history, Suleiman the Magnificent. S2, Ep9
Africa's Gold Hoard. Josh Gates travels to South Africa in search of former President Paul Kruger's missing gold cache. He evades dangerous poachers and meets the Shangaan tribe. S2, Ep11
Life Or Death In Michigan. The Dagues moved to Michigan's wilderness. But they have no power, predators killed their chickens and all their water must be hand-pumped from a well. S2, Ep11
Quake On The Forty. The Raneys return to Alaska, but they find their homestead on complete disrepair. They race to build a steel tram before the deep freeze sets in again. S2, Ep12
The Bushmen take over their new recruit's mine, but the new claim proves equally treacherous with little sign of opal. Bishop resorts to explosives to move a wall. S5, Ep16
The Bishop and Scotty struggle to make safe a wall and end up causing an avalanche. Meanwhile, the Mooka Boys' bobcat is hit with critical failure. S5, Ep17
The Widowmaker: Part 1. Intense weather and even more damage to his battered boat take a toll on Sig's heart. And the USCG attempts a dangerous medevac. S12, Ep17
Born With No Eyes. A young Brazilian boy was born without eyes, and the family hopes to have prosthetic eyes made. Two brothers in Nebraska suffer a rare bone loss condition. S5, Ep7
My Parasitic Twin. An Indian woman gives birth to a baby boy with the head and arms of his dead twin brother attached his chest. A Brazilian woman seeks treatment for her giant leg. S5, Ep8
The Poseidon Crew are forced to hunt Victoria's frozen high country. Meanwhile, the Gold Timers use the last of their savings to hire some big machinery. S7, Ep6
Valley Of The Banished. 12 survivalists enter a punishing African location for their 40-day challenge. They encounter deadly crocodiles and territorial leopards. S5, Ep1

Teleshopping.
Virginia Tobacco Plant. The team battle intense heat to hunt for items at a cigarette factory in Virginia. Later, Mike and Tay build a love sign from repurposed materials. S11, Ep8
Cascades Inn. The team are in Bath County to salvage items from the Cascades Inn. Back at the shop, Mike works with the crew to revamp a customer's family heirloom. S11, Ep9
Virgin Ground. A gold rush is sparked when Shawn offers the fleet access to his virgin claim of Bering Sea floor, rumoured to contain $14m of gold. But access comes at a price. S5, Ep17
Fear The Reaper. When Zeke's custom sluice malfunctions, Emily tries to save the Clark's season. The Kellys gets too close to Vernon's claim and can Mr. Gold plug a risky leak? S5, Ep18
The Victoria Diggers' desperately fight for survival, but they may have stumbled across a monster nugget. The Gold Gypsies fend off deadly snakes during their search. S4, Ep6
The Demon Of Peru. Forrest and Jessica are in Peru to examine reports of a man-like beast. They venture deep into the Andes to find the source of the terrifying attacks. S1, Ep5
New Blood. Two new skippers join the veteran fleet to take on the treacherous Bering Sea, but when they invade the Wizard's crab grounds a bigger battle is on. Who will be victorious? S7, Ep1
Cappy's Curse. After a tragic event on their way to a Guarani village, the team secures vital information from the village elders about a special stone hidden near 'The Demon Falls'. S2, Ep6
Kalahari Desert's Lost City. Josh Gates is in Africa's Kalahari Desert seeking a fabled lost city. He encounters wild animals, rafts down rapids and flies in an open-air helicopter. S2, Ep12
Yamashita's Gold. Josh Gates joins two treasure hunters in the Philippines searching for Yamashita's Gold, which has been hidden since World War II. S2, Ep13
Fire & Gold. The Raneys build the first hydro-electric wheel on the Little Susitna River to make the homestead safe for children. And, they fix a faulty electrical system. S3, Ep1
Moose Mayhem. The Raneys go all out to save a mother and daughter from rampaging moose. Matt teaches predator deterrent techniques, while Misty builds a snow-proof greenhouse. S3, Ep2
The Bishop loses his partner Scotty deep underground. The Tarantos' hopes of exposing a rare pocket of opal are in jeopardy and Young Guns make a big mistake. S5, Ep18
The Misfits put their faith in an ancient bulldozer for the season's last dig. Meanwhile, infighting stalls efforts to unearth the Opal Whisperers' haul. S5, Ep19
The Widowmaker: Part 2. Sig fights to survive a massive heart attack, Bill learns a dark secret about his son, Josh fights to prove himself, and Jake learns a valuable lesson. S12, Ep18
Search And Rescue. Hunter runs pay dirt from a promising new location called the Plateau. Todd calls the Alaska Troopers when Framer goes missing on a solo caribou hunt. S2, Ep9
A Wrinkle In Time. A Bering Sea gale takes out Rick's deckhand while Sophia helms the Seabrooke in high-risk conditions. Johnathan alters time to make good on a promise. S20, Ep9
The Gold Timers gamble their last $6,000 and commission a magnetic drone survey. The Ferals face a killer snake, while Brad and Chris get expert advice. S7, Ep7
